reviews.review_description: I do like the combat but update the enemy's where which is just fist combat but songs make me... I think Abt sad gt drama then play the most hard song then combo the sh1t out of ppl
Sometimes I feel like I’m Batman and be like “ YOU KILLED MY FAMILY!” ITS SO GREATTTTT
It’s one of my favorite games but my brother can’t play the demo because it’s off the meta store we rarely buy games that cost money so please bring it back…🫤

reviews.review_title: The best demo's i've ever seen!
reviews.review_description:
In this game you have access to a variety of weapons:
A sword
A kunai
A shield
There are also features like wall climbing enemy wave spawns and 
Superpowers which are:
Fire 
Energy blasts
Weapon spawning
Healing 
Seeing enemies through walls
Web shooters
Its just great that you get these things for free and its not that the demo ends after a little while, no you can just play for how long you want to which is just amazing!!
The game doesn’t load for me

reviews.review_title: This game mad me gay I like it

reviews.review_description: Its amazing I love it but I have one problem and it's the price mainly because I'm a kid but the demo imo should have more accessibility rather then 3 maps and just a few powers and two of the characters imo adding 1 or more of the characters to fight would make it better but other then that its amazing and 10/10 would recommend

reviews.review_title: It’s good but there’s stuff I can’t use
reviews.review_description: Why can’t I use the rock power or the flight power ?

developer_response.body: As this is a free demo, not everything is available to use. Those two power sets, as well as some maps, power upgrades, enemies, weapons, etc will be available in the full release.

reviews.review_description: You get to swing like spider man lol and fight people
This game is fun the only real problem is it doesn’t have a long Range￼￼ Weapon like a gun￼ or a bow
Its like boneworks for people that can’t get boneworks I love the slowmo
There should be more weapons because it would make the game funner because stuff like the spear,katana, and war hammer should be in the demo version then maybe it would get a five stars
This has serious potential- im looking forwards to what the development team will bring to this title. The demo alone has me sold :)
this is a awsome game thatnk you so mutch. Its a mix of  neo spiderman and iron man pleas do take away the fact that you can grab the entire sky with your web
I LOVE Spider-Man and I’m just going to say I wish it was real this game is a personal favorite one thing that gets me is that the webs need better grabbing animation so I hope you guys fix this.

reviews.review_title: This is one of the best free games
reviews.review_description: I love this game u have to have plus it is free

I haven't tried the full game yet, but this demo is awesome and I love fighting agents in the apartments, excited to play full game. 

The power combo I use both against enemies (especially agents) is spider webs in my left hand and a knife in my right hand. I enjoy using the spider web to boost into enemies while holding onto a wall to make them go flying.

Game Rating:
Quick note: The only two things I don’t like is 1. It’s demo so obviously not all of the features and 2. You have limited amount of power even though it refills.
